content: whisper.cpp small.en on M1 8GB with Metal achieves 20x-40x real-time factor; 1-hour lecture transcribes in ~1.5-3 minutes. small.en model ~240MB fits comfortably in 8GB. large-v3 achieves ~10x RT. Metal GPU vs CPU comparison shows significant speedup. Discussion #1767 reports issues with larger models on 8GB M2 Air. tiny/base models are instant and faster than real-time.
